prestazioni: 4G63T (7-Bolt) stroker build to 2.2L with Manley 87mm forged crank, Eagle H-beam rods, and JE 87.5mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), paired with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (1.06 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo manifold by Full-Race Motorsports
Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom flex-fuel ethanol mapping, ID1000 injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -10AN lines and Earl's Pro-Lite fittings for oil and fuel management

Full billet aluminum valvetrain with Kelford 272/280 camshafts, Supertech titanium retainers, and Ferrea 1mm oversized intake/exhaust valves, paired with a Tomei Type-S adjustable cam gear set and ARP head studs (200,000 PSI)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (3" wider front, 4" wider rear) and a custom 3D-printed ABS front splitter with integrated air curtains for downforce optimization

Voltex Type-7 rear wing with custom 3D-printed aluminum pedestals and Gurney flap, paired with a custom carbon fiber diffuser by Seibon Carbon with integrated exhaust cutouts for dual 4" titanium exhaust by HKS Hi-Power
Custom livery by Fatlace Designs featuring a matte black base with neon green and purple accents, including a full carbon fiber hood (Seibon) with a custom heat extractor duct for the GTX4202R turbo
